title: TelemetryAuditCompleted payload
description: Emitted by the chain query-telemetry-substrate TT4 retrospective to record that the read-side telemetry substrate (grounding_events + query_interactions + query_resolutions + three query_* projections) has been verified against the chain's success criteria. Self-hosting check parallel to ArchitectureAuditCompleted — the read-side substrate uses the write-side substrate to record its own audit outcome, exercising the cross-substrate seam (events.event_id ↔ query_resolutions.write_event_ids) in the act of closing the chain. Findings are keyed to TT1 success criteria, TT1.5 enum-revision verifications, and the per-handler-table consolidation handoff to the telemetry-substrate-cleanup follow-on chain. See docs/TELEMETRY_SUBSTRATE.md §12 and docs/TELEMETRY_RETROSPECTIVE_2026-05-17.md.

audit_doc.description: Pointer to the audit source-doc the findings were keyed against — typically docs/TELEMETRY_SUBSTRATE.md (TT1 design) + docs/TELEMETRY_LABEL_SPIKE.md (TT1.5 enum closures).

summary.description: One- or two-paragraph executive summary of the audit outcome — what landed, what's deferred, which roadmap downstream becomes buildable.

recommended_next_phase.description: Free-text recommendation for the next phase of work (e.g. "Pick up telemetry-substrate-cleanup chain T1-T3 + the cross-encoder reranker fine-tune from local-ml-roadmap.md §1.1"). Optional.

findings.description: One entry per audit checklist item. Severity uses the audit-convention enum (low / medium / high / critical); use n/a for informational findings.

item.description: Audit checklist item identifier and short description.

status.description: pass = criterion satisfied; fail = criterion not satisfied (must file follow-on); partial = satisfied with documented gap; deferred = explicitly out of scope for this chain.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence supporting status — SQL query result, test name, commit SHA, doc pointer, etc.

severity.description: Severity if status is fail/partial. n/a for informational rows.
